text:
- `why_resource_command(key)` — why a specific effect (e.g. *publish 30315 status*, *open subscription*) was emitted
- `why_changed(node)` — why a derived value (e.g. the status text, the snapshot) recomputed
- `why_output_frame(key)` — why a materialized output (e.g. the hook snapshot frame) emitted
- `dependency_path(from, to)` — the shortest causal chain from an input to an effect
